disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symmetrical, bilateral light-to-dark brown macular pigmentation confined to sun-exposed areas of the face (malar cheeks, central forehead, cutaneous upper lip), present for months with gradual onset
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe exactly where the discolouration is?
Is it in the same place on both sides of your face?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's across both cheeks, my forehead and above my lip — and it's pretty much a mirror image on both sides. It's been faintly there for a few months.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden dramatic darkening over 48 hours following a full weekend of intense UV (beach) exposure
trigger_question_examples: Did anything happen just before it got darker?
Have you had a lot of sun exposure recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah — I spent the whole weekend at the beach, and it went much darker straight after that.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recently commenced a combined oral contraceptive pill three months ago
trigger_question_examples: Have you started any new medications recently, including the contraceptive pill?
Are you on any hormonal treatment or the pill?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I did start a new contraceptive pill about three months ago — I hadn't been on one before that.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pertinent negatives of the lesions themselves — no itch, pain, scaling, crusting, bleeding, ulceration, or change in skin texture; borders irregular but blend smoothly, not a single dark growing spot
trigger_question_examples: Is any part of it itchy, sore, bleeding, crusting or raised up from the skin?
Is there one spot that is growing, changing shape or darker than the rest?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, none of it itches or hurts, nothing is bleeding or scabbing, and it's all flat — it's not one growing spot, it's an even wash of colour on both sides.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I haven't really looked that closely — I'm just scared of the colour.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Systemic / adrenal screen negative — no fatigue, weakness, dizziness on standing, weight loss, nausea or vomiting, and no darkening of palmar creases, gums or oral mucosa (argues against Addison's disease)
trigger_question_examples: Have you been feeling weak, dizzy, losing weight, or been off your food or vomiting?
Have the palms of your hands, your gums or the inside of your mouth also gone darker?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I feel physically well in myself — no dizziness or weight loss or vomiting. My hands and gums look completely normal, it's only my face.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't think so, I've just been panicking about my face.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe acute health anxiety with panic attacks and hyperventilation, driven by fear of a rapidly spreading skin cancer
trigger_question_examples: What is it that you are most worried this could be?
How are you coping with the worry about this?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm terrified it's a spreading skin cancer eating across my face. I've been having panic attacks and I can't stop crying or checking the mirror.
